title: Terrarian Tools
description: This mod replaces Minecraft tools with Terraria tools.
body:
# ABOUT

This texture changes all tools and swords to tools and swords from Terraria.

The sheet with changes will be below


<details>
<summary>Swords</summary>
 
- Wooden sword - Copper shortsword
- Stone sword - Light's bane
- Copper sword - Copper sword
- Iron sword - True night's edge
- Golden sword - Excalibur
- Diamond Sword - Terra blade
- Netherite sword - Zenith
  

</details>


<details>
<summary>Axes</summary>
  
- Wooden axe - Copper axe
- Stone axe - Silver axe
- Copper axe - Tungsten axe
- Iron axe - Molten axe
- Golden axe - Mythril waraxe
- Diamond axe - Chlorophyte greataxe
- Netherite axe - Axe of regrowth



</details>


<details>
<summary>Spears</summary>
  
- Wooden spear - Spear
- Stone spear - Storm Spear
- Copper spear - The Rotted Fork
- Iron spear - Dark Lance
- Golden spear - Gungnir
- Diamond spear - Mythril Halberd
- Netherite spear - Chlorophyte Partisan



</details>


<details>
<summary>Pickaxes</summary>
  
- Wooden pickaxe - Copper pickaxe
- Stone pickaxe - Silver pickaxe
- Copper pickaxe - Tungsten pickaxe
- Iron pickaxe - Molten pickaxe
- Golden pickaxe - Orichalcum pickaxe
- Diamond pickaxe - Chlorophyte pickaxe
- netherite pickaxe - Luminite pickaxes



</details>

Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of Terraria in Minecraft!
